title: Exline's Copper Equipment
description: This mod adds copper tools, a sword, armor, and horse armor. You can smelt down old copper equipment for copper nuggets!
body:
# Enhance your Minecraft experience with the Copper Equipment Mod!  
Unlock the potential of copper with this mod, which adds a full set of tools, weapons, armor, and more. Copper equipment strikes a balance between iron and stone gear, offering moderate strength and durability with a unique look.  

![Icon](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c13f66f8af26ef41bd2eacc4013bc3ff660a150b_0.webp)

## Features:  
![New Recipes Unlocked! Check your recipe book](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6857be937942512bd4ed0e5b1cb5d81ecc01fb81.gif)
- **Copper Tools and Sword** – Reliable tools and weapons with decent stats, ideal for early to mid-game use.  
- **Copper Armor** – Offers moderate protection with armor ratings of 2 (helmet), 4 (chestplate), 3 (leggings), and 2 (boots). If your armor gets oxidized it will lose enchantments and trims.
- **Copper Horse Armor** – Protect your steed with stylish copper plating and a rating of 4.  
- **Copper Buckets** – Cannot hold lava or mobs but can instantly scoop and place sand, red sand, gravel, and soul sand.  (v3.2.0 +)
- **Copper Shears** – Functions like iron shears but with fewer uses (*Bug: Forgot to mixin to plant and leaves blocks, so they only work on sheep, but can clear grass and leaves fast! I'll fix this in the next update)  (v3.2.0 +)
- **Copper Bow** – A standard bow with increased durability (618 uses).  (v3.2.0 +)

![Copper Armor Recipes](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ed93fb2dc9b7a4d4431c446a3a56415914585c62.gif)

![Copper Tools Recipes](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b8d26e82e52caf2b81fd13c1598008cb788f1a1b.gif)

## Default Stats:  
- **Durability:** 190 uses (varies by item)  
- **Efficiency:** 5  
- **Tool Enchantability:** 10  
- **Armor Enchantability:** 12  
- **Sword Attack Damage:** 5.5  
- **Sword Attack Speed:** 1.6  
- **Shovel Attack Damage:** 4  
- **Shovel Attack Speed:** 1  
- **Axe Attack Damage:** 9  
- **Axe Attack Speed:** 0.9  
- **Hoe Attack Damage:** 1  
- **Hoe Attack Speed:** 2.5  
- **Helmet Armor Rating:** 2  
- **Chestplate Armor Rating:** 4  
- **Leggings Armor Rating:** 3  
- **Boots Armor Rating:** 2  
- **Horse Armor Rating:** 4  

## Customization:  
Make the mod truly your own! All equipment stats can be customized to suit your playstyle or balance preferences. Simply edit the configuration file located at:

```
C:\Users\username\AppData\Roaming\.minecraft\config\exlinecopperequipment.properties
```
Adjust durability, attack damage, efficiency, and more to tailor the experience to your liking!  

## Dynamic Oxidation Effect:  
Tools, weapons, and armor naturally oxidize as they wear down, changing from bright copper to a weathered green. This visual effect doesn’t impact performance but adds a unique aesthetic to your gear.  

![Oxidation](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c7902960f69ff4ffe0d4f4796f3aa256916760fa.png)

## Seamless Progression:  
Copper equipment bridges the gap between stone and iron, making it perfect for early-game exploration and mid-game adventures.  

## Download Now!  
Bring copper to life in your survival world with the Copper Equipment Mod. Add functionality, style, and customization options to enhance your Minecraft experience!
